zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margery Rotsey於大約1519年出生在英國武斯特斯爾金斯 諾頓時，她的父親John Rotsy35歲，母親Lady Margaret Walsh18歲。她於1539年與Sir William Gyse在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1558年11月24日在英國格盧斯特斯爾艾爾莫享年40歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾艾爾莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margery Rotsey于大约1519年出生在英国武斯特斯爾金斯 諾頓时，她的父亲John Rotsy35岁，母亲Lady Margaret Walsh18岁。她于1539年与Sir William Gyse在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1558年11月24日在英国格盧斯特斯爾艾爾莫享年40岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾艾爾莫。

nameMeanings.name: Rotsey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Rowsey  , a surname of Walloon or perhaps French origin.

variants.name: Rowsey
meanings: Altered form of a Walloon or perhaps French (mainly northern) surname, probably Rouzé or Rousé (see Rouse ), variants of Rosé (see Rose ). The surname Rowsey was brought to North America from England. Compare Rousey and Rowzee .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margery Rotsey was born about 1519, in Kings Norton, Worcestershire, England, her father, John Rotsy, was 35 and her mother, Lady Margaret Walsh, was 18. She married Sir William Gyse in 1539, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 24 November 1558, in Elmore, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Elmore, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margery Rotsey est née environ 1519, à Kings Norton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Rotsy, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Walsh, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Gyse en 1539, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 24 novembre 1558, à Elmore, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Elmore, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margery Rotsey um 1519 in Kings Norton, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Rotsy 35 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Walsh 18. Sie hat 1539 in England, United Kingdom Sir William Gyse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 24. November 1558 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Elmore, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Elmore, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margery Rotsey è nata il circa 1519 nel Kings Norton, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, John Rotsy, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Walsh, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Gyse nel 1539, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 24 novembre 1558, nel Elmore, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Elmore, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margery Rotseyが約1519年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアキングズ ノートンで生まれた時，父John Rotsyは35歳，母Lady Margaret Walshは18歳であった。1539年にイギリスイギリスでSir William Gyseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1558年11月24日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエルモーで40歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエルモーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margery Rotsey(이)가 대략 1519년 영국 워스스터실르 킨그스 노르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Rotsy(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Walsh(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1539년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir William Gyse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 11월 24일 영국 그루스스터실르 엘모어에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 엘모어에 묻혔다.

mn.Elmore, Stroud district, Gloucestershire: Stroud, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margery Rotsey nasceu aproximadamente 1519, em Kings Norton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Rotsy, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Walsh, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Gyse em 1539, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 24 de novembro de 1558, em Elmore, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Elmore, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margery Rotsey родилась около 1519 г. в местности кингс нортон, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Rotsy было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Walsh, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Gyse в 1539 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 24 ноября 1558 г. в местности элмор, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности элмор, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margery Rotsey nació aproximadamente 1519, en Kings Norton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Rotsy, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Walsh, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir William Gyse en 1539, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 24 de noviembre de 1558, en Elmore, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Elmore, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
